Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course on M&A directly supports economic productivity (Target 8.2). It also addresses '員工留用' (employee retention), which relates to protecting labor rights (Target 8.8) during restructuring.
evidence: 企業併購法 (Business Mergers and Acquisitions Law)

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: M&A is a key mechanism for industrial restructuring and innovation. The course provides the legal framework knowledge to facilitate these processes, supporting Targets 9.2, 9.3 and 9.b.
evidence: 企業併購法 (Business Mergers and Acquisitions Law)

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course covers '股份收買請求權' (appraisal rights) and '內線交易議題' (insider trading), legal mechanisms that protect minority shareholders and promote fair market regulation (Targets 10.3, 10.5).
evidence: 併購交易中之內線交易議題

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course is fundamentally about the rule of law (Target 16.3) in corporate transactions. It covers legal processes and '內線交易議題' (insider trading), promoting transparent institutions (16.6).
evidence: 科目名稱：企業併購法 (Course Name: Business Mergers and Acquisitions Law)
